# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from "@vercel/node";

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type BodyPayload = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  status?: number;
  delayMs?: number;
  chunkSize?: number;
  repeat?: number;
};

const hopByHopHeaders = new Set([
  "connection",
  "keep-alive",
  "proxy-authenticate",
  "proxy-authorization",
  "te",
  "trailer",
  "transfer-encoding",
  "upgrade",
  "content-length",
]);

function sanitizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>): Headers {
  const h = new Headers();

  if (input) {
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(input)) {
      const key = k.toLowerCase();
      if (hopByHopHeaders.has(key)) continue;
      if (key === "set-cookie") continue;
      if (typeof v !== "string") continue;
      h.set(k, v);
    }
  }

  if (!h.has("content-type")) h.set("content-type", "application/octet-stream; charset=utf-8");
  if (!h.has("cache-control")) h.set("cache-control", "no-store");
  if (!h.has("x-content-type-options")) h.set("x-content-type-options", "nosniff");

  return h;
}

function toUint8Array(content: unknown): Uint8Array {
  if (content == null) return new Uint8Array();
  if (typeof content === "string") return new TextEncoder().encode(content);
  if (typeof content === "number" || typeof content === "boolean") return new TextEncoder().encode(String(content));
  try {
    return new TextEncoder().encode(JSON.stringify(content));
  } catch {
    return new TextEncoder().encode(String(content));
  }
}

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", { status: 405, headers: { allow: "POST" } });
  }

  let payload: BodyPayload = {};
  try {
    payload = (await req.json()) ?? {};
  } catch {
    payload = {};
  }

  const headers = sanitizeHeaders(payload.headers);
  const status = typeof payload.status === "number" ? payload.status : 200;

  const data = toUint8Array(payload.content);
  const delayMs = typeof payload.delayMs === "number" && payload.delayMs >= 0 ? payload.delayMs : 0;
  const chunkSize = typeof payload.chunkSize === "number" && payload.chunkSize > 0 ? payload.chunkSize : data.length || 1;
  const repeat = typeof payload.repeat === "number" && payload.repeat > 0 ? payload.repeat : 1;

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (let r = 0; r < repeat; r++) {
          for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += chunkSize) {
            const chunk = data.subarray(i, Math.min(i + chunkSize, data.length));
            controller.enqueue(chunk);
            if (delayMs) await sleep(delayMs);
          }
          if (data.length === 0) {
            controller.enqueue(new Uint8Array());
            if (delayMs) await sleep(delayMs);
          }
        }
      } finally {
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  const piped = stream.pipeThrough(new TransformStream<Uint8Array, Uint8Array>());

  return new Response(piped, { status, headers });
}
